title: Čakovec, Međimurje — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Čakovec, Međimurje: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Čakovec is a city in Međimurje with a population of 27,000. The capital of the Međimurje region, known for its Baroque Zrinski Castle, the Mura River, and a rich tradition of wine production and cultural festivals.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
